hero.title: Company Profile
hero.lead: Guangzhou Ibocode Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. (Ibocode) was built for global B2B buyers who want less drama and more predictable outcomes.
paragraphs: For over 10 years, we have grown by solving the problems procurement teams remember most: inconsistent read performance, unclear specs, slow replies, and shipments that don't match the approved sample.

Today, Ibocode supports wholesalers, brand owners, retailers, software integrators, and hardware distributors worldwide with a simple promise: stable quality, factory-direct efficiency, 100% aging test before shipment, and clear communication.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To deliver integrated data-capture and printing solutions - scanners, printers, and POS equipment built to read accurately and survive real daily use, not just pass a sample test.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become a long-term manufacturing partner for barcode and POS brands worldwide - helping customers launch faster, reduce returns, and scale repeat orders.

products.title: What We Make
products.description: We focus on high-velocity data-capture and printing products that solve everyday needs and perform consistently in retail, warehouse, and industrial environments:
items: Handheld barcode scanners (wired, wireless, and Bluetooth 2D imagers)
Omni-directional desktop and platform scanners
Portable barcode readers
Thermal receipt and label printers (2"/3"/4")
Cash drawers and POS machines
Card readers and integrated data-capture solutions

items.title: Wholesalers & Importers
items.description: Stable replenishment and fewer receiving surprises.

items.title: Brand Owners
items.description: Private-label scanner and printer lines with differentiation customers can feel.

items.title: Retailers
items.description: Shelf presentation, packaging clarity, and defect control.

items.title: E-commerce Sellers
items.description: Fighting return rates, reviews, and listing compliance.

items.title: System Integrators & ISVs
items.description: Reliable hardware that drops into POS, ERP, and warehouse workflows.

cards.title: Factory Advantages
items: Structured production lines and work cells for scale-ready workflow
Standardized work instructions and checkpoints reduce variation
Functional testing and 100% aging test aligned to common failure causes
Revision control so approved stays approved

cards.title: Company Advantages
items: Clear RFQ inputs for faster, accurate quotes
Faster decisions with R&D and production aligned
Photo or video confirmations during pilot runs
Export-ready communication that respects your timeline

cards.title: Pricing Advantage
items: Factory-direct efficiency with clear cost structure
Value engineering tiers to hit target price
Stable repeat orders reduce rework and claims

compliance.title: Quality and Compliance Mindset
compliance.description: Compliance planning protects your listings, reduces customs delays, and strengthens buyer confidence. We align documentation and labeling based on your product configuration and destination market.
items: EU Declaration of Conformity and CE readiness
RoHS substance restrictions for electronics
FCC equipment authorization pathways
ISO 9001 aligned QMS documentation if required

howWeWork.title: How We Work
steps: Confirm market requirements, application, and performance specs.
Prototype quickly to validate read performance, ergonomics, and user experience.
Lock spec, packaging, and labeling before mass production.
Run production with checkpoints and documented revisions.
Support export packing and repeat-order stability as you scale.

primary.title: Start an RFQ
primary.description: Share target market, application, and order quantity. We respond within 24 hours with a practical quote and clear next steps.

secondary.title: Request Samples
secondary.description: Validate read performance and durability before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
